---
title: "Introduction to R"
code-line-numbers: false
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" width="780" height="500" src="slides/intro-r.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/intro-r.html){target="_blank"} &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="slides_pdf/intro-r.pdf" download>Download PDF slides</a>

# Task

Go to the [task page](tasks/intro-r.qmd) for the exercises.
